title: wedelia rechingeriana
intro: Wedelia rechingeriana, also known as Wedelia or Rati, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the tropical regions of India and Sri Lanka. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and wounds. The health benefits of Wedelia rechingeriana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Wedelia rechingeriana is traditionally prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
